params.TgtPrompt: Select target activated or triggered ability you control
params.SpellDescription: Copy target activated or triggered ability you control X times. You may choose new targets for the copies. This ability can't be copied and X can't be 0. (Mana abilities can't be targeted.)

remaining_params.TgtPrompt: Select target activated or triggered ability you control
remaining_params.SpellDescription: Copy target activated or triggered ability you control X times. You may choose new targets for the copies. This ability can't be copied and X can't be 0. (Mana abilities can't be targeted.)
